title: alnus henryi
intro: Alnus henryi, also known as the Henry's alder or Chinese alder, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its bark, leaves, and cones, which are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alnus henryi are said to include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Alnus henryi can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, with the dried bark and leaves often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
